history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe path is to go downward along column B, so I should first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell. Moving forward advances me down the open corridor toward the lower rows and eventually toward the goal, while avoiding the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is a safe floor cell. Moving down along column B is safe for several cells and helps me progress toward the lower open area that leads to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 05 column B, which is a safe floor cell. Moving down along column B is safe, while turning right would face lava at column C. So the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column B is a safe floor cell. Moving forward advances me toward the open path that can lead rightward and then down to the goal, while avoiding the lava at column C and row 07.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 07 column B, which is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safe path is to go right along row 06 toward column H, then down to the goal at row 08 column H. To start doing that, I should turn left from facing down to facing right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing right. The cells ahead on row 06 are open, and going forward moves me toward the only safe passage to the goal near column H. The next cell at row 06 column C is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is a safe floor (`.`). The goal is at row 08 column H, and moving right along row 06 is a safe path toward the open column near H while avoiding the lava barrier on row 07. So the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving right along row 06 is safe, while moving down now would eventually be blocked by lava at row 07. So the best next step is to continue right toward column H before turning down later.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E, facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving right along row 06 is safe, while moving down immediately is blocked by lava on row 07. So the best next step is to continue right toward the open passage at column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 06 column G is safe floor (`.`). The goal is at row 08 column H, and moving right along row 06 toward the open path at column H is a safe step that helps me approach the goal while avoiding the lava barrier on row 07.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column G, facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column H is safe floor, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 08 column H. So the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead is row 06 column I, which is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 08 column H, so I should turn to face downward and start moving toward it. Turning right from `>` will make me face down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 07 column H, which is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 08 column H, so moving forward brings me closer to it without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H, facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 08 column H, which is the goal and is safe to enter. The best action is to move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
